## Description

Please include a summary of the change, the reasoning behind it, and which issue it resolves.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring or linting fix

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved all warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` to confirm typings remain valid.
- [ ] I have run `npm run test` and all 44 unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation or JSDocs if necessary.
- [ ] New examples or tests have been added where applicable.

## Verification & Testing Performed

Describe the testing you performed to verify these changes (e.g. CLI runner execution, Next.js build runs, or Vitest unit tests).
